nf/quick-397-rebase.task_description: Add a /nf:coderlm query skill that lets users interactively query the coderlm symbol server — callers, implementation location, associated tests, and source peek — from within nForma. The skill should start coderlm if not running, accept a subcommand+args, call the adapter, and display results in a readable format.
nf/quick-397-rebase.approach: Create a /nf:coderlm query skill that accepts subcommands (callers, implementation, tests, peek) with arguments, auto-starts coderlm if needed, calls the adapter, and displays formatted results in the terminal.
out_of_scope: Modifying the coderlm-lifecycle.cjs or binary download/spawn logic
Changing the coderlm-adapter.cjs methods or adding new query endpoints
Implementing caching beyond what the adapter already provides
Adding interactive prompts or multi-step wizards for parameter entry
Integrating coderlm query results into other nf: skills or workflow automation
nf/quick-397-rebase.risk_reason: Single primary file (commands/nf/coderlm.md) with skill enhancement, leveraging existing coderlm-adapter.cjs, but adds new query functionality requiring implementation logic beyond simple documentation updates.
